message:
Fix CI: add sync:changelog to linkcheck job

- Run sync:changelog before build:linkcheck in lint workflow
- Fix prettier formatting in topics.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -96,5 +96,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
 
+      - name: Sync changelog
+        run: pnpm sync:changelog
+
       - name: Run link check
         run: pnpm run build:linkcheck
